judge_result.short_rationale: Rinsing for 15–20 minutes with the eye open is correct and usable, but it misses the required immediate action to call a physician or poison control center and instead says to go to a doctor/hospital. It also changes the contact lens timing from after 5 minutes to immediately, reducing source fidelity.
